title: Section 12
content: 1[(1)] The President may, from time to time, after consulting the Election Commission, by order, alter or amend any order made by him under 2* * *section 11. 3[(2) An order under sub-section (1) may contain provisions for the allocation of any member representing any council constituency immediately before the making of the order to any constituency delimited a new or altered by the order and for such other incidental and consequential matters as the President may deem necessary.]
footnote: 1. Section 12 renumbered as sub-section (1) of that section by Act 20 of 1960, s. 2 (w.e.f. 8-5-1960). 2. The words and figures "section 6, section 9, or" omitted by Act 2 of 1956, s. 7..br 3. Ins. by Act 20 of 1960, s. 2 (w.e.f. 8-5-1960).
